title: Jodhpur, Rajasthan — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Jodhpur, Rajasthan: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Jodhpur is a city in Rajasthan with a population of 1,200,000. The Blue City of Rajasthan, dominated by the imposing Mehrangarh Fort, known for its blue-painted houses and royal heritage.

Last updated: July 20, 2026
